name: Spy City
overview: After a defector is murdered, British agent Fielding Scott is assigned to track down a mole in his own ranks in 1961 Berlin. His investigation leads him into a deadly web of crime, betrayal and paranoia. Who can Scott trust in the city of spies?

trailers.title: Spy City Official Trailer | Premieres Exclusively on AMC+ April 15
